author: felicepantaleo
body: Two hitMap.find results were dereferenced without an end() check, unlike every sibling lookup in the file. When RecHitMapProducer takes its empty-map fallback (hit collections unavailable) the validator segfaults on the end iterator. Skip such hits, marking them as not linked to any CaloParticle.
title: Guard unguarded hitMap lookups in HGVHistoProducerAlgo
